summary: Both P1 review findings are already addressed in the plan. Finding 1 (Task 1 defers Jupiter price collector update to Task 8 causing typecheck failure) is resolved because Task 1 Step 4 explicitly updates collect-jupiter-price.ts and its test to use the new options signature. Finding 2 (Task 8 expands deps signature but composition-root.ts isn't updated until Task 9) is resolved because Task 8 Step 5 explicitly wires JUPITER_API_BASE and JUPITER_API_KEY into the job and composition root. The plan is clean and passes review.
rebuttal: Finding 1 claims collect-jupiter-price.ts is not updated until Task 8, but Task 1 Step 4 explicitly states 'Update the existing Jupiter price collector and its test to use the new options signature' and lists both src/application/collect-jupiter-price.ts and tests/application/collect-jupiter-price.test.ts as files to modify in Task 1. Finding 2 claims composition-root.ts is not modified until Task 9, but Task 8 Step 5 explicitly states 'Wire the new Jupiter dependencies into the existing job and composition root' and lists both src/jobs/jupiter-price-job.ts and src/adapters/node/composition-root.ts as files to modify in Task 8. Both findings misread the plan — the fixes are already in the correct tasks.
